title: phlomoides tatsienensis
intro: Phlomoides tatsienensis, also known as Tatsien-lu or Chinese marsh sage, is a perennial plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phlomoides tatsienensis include its ability to relieve headaches, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Phlomoides tatsienensis typically involve steaming or decocting the leaves and stems to create a medicinal tea or infusion.
